rag_rules: Write AGREE contracts inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use assume and guarantee statements with labels and expressions
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use visible identifiers and avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq name : type = expression; for equation declarations
Use const name : type = value; for constant declarations
Use assign output = expression; for assignment statements
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names (use int, real, and bool instead)
irrelevant_topics: Defensive rules for assumed type vs actual type
